transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Yes, hi — I need help with a payment that was sent to me but I haven't received it. It was sent three days ago.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Is this your account the money should have come into?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Then it's a problem with the sending bank. If the payment didn't arrive, NatWest — or whoever sent it — needs to trace it.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: I thought you might be able to trace it on your end too?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We can only see what comes in. We can't trace something that doesn't exist in our system.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: NatWest says it left their system though.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Then it'll arrive eventually. Wait a few more days. These things sort out.

transcript.speaker: customer
transcript.text: Wait a few more days with money that's apparently disappeared?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sorry, not much else I can do.

planted_violations: failed to verify customer identity properly
refused to raise a payment trace despite payment being confirmed sent from other bank
incorrectly stated that the receiving bank cannot trace incoming payments
dismissive throughout; offered no actionable assistance
